requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — LIBNOR Conformity, IEC 62619 and IEC 62133 as the Practical Baseline for Lebanon BESS
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——LIBNOR合规及IEC 62619和IEC 62133作为黎巴嫩BESS的实际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——LIBNOR合規及IEC 62619和IEC 62133作為黎巴嫩BESS的實際基準

summary.en: LIBNOR (Lebanese Standards Institution — المؤسسة اللبنانية للمواصفات والمقاييس) is Lebanon's national standards body. LIBNOR adopts IEC standards as the basis for Lebanese standards (NL designations), making IEC-based conformity the practical product safety reference framework in Lebanon. Lebanon does not have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety certification regime equivalent to Saudi Arabia's SABER/IEC 62619 mandatory pre-shipment CoC or the EU Battery Regulation. However, importer and distributor due diligence — including ensuring products carry credible IEC 62619 and/or IEC 62133 certification from ILAC-accredited laboratories — is the primary practical gate for responsible BESS supply into Lebanon. IEC 62619:2022 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules for commercial and industrial applications. IEC 62133 (Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries) is relevant for smaller residential battery units. IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based energy storage systems) covers system-level safety. Given Lebanon's rapid, often informal battery deployment context, the quality and authenticity of IEC safety certification — particularly IEC 62619 from genuinely ILAC-accredited laboratories — is a critical risk factor for exporters and importers.
summary.zh: LIBNOR（黎巴嫩标准机构）是黎巴嫩国家标准机构。LIBNOR以IEC标准为基础采纳黎巴嫩标准（NL编号），使基于IEC的合规成为黎巴嫩的实际产品安全参考框架。黎巴嫩没有与沙特SABER/IEC 62619强制装运前CoC或欧盟《电池法规》相当的、经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全认证制度。然而，进口商和分销商的尽职调查——包括确保产品持有来自ILAC认可实验室的可信IEC 62619和/或IEC 62133认证——是负责任的BESS黎巴嫩供应的主要实际门槛。IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是商业和工业应用锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准。IEC 62133（便携式密封二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）适用于较小的住宅电池装置。IEC 62933-5-2（电化学储能系统安全要求）覆盖系统级安全。鉴于黎巴嫩快速、往往非正式的电池部署背景，IEC安全认证的质量和真实性——特别是来自真正ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62619——是出口商和进口商的关键风险因素。
summary.zht: LIBNOR（黎巴嫩標準機構）是黎巴嫩國家標準機構。LIBNOR以IEC標準為基礎採納黎巴嫩標準（NL編號），使基於IEC的合規成為黎巴嫩的實際產品安全參考框架。黎巴嫩沒有與沙特SABER/IEC 62619強制裝運前CoC或歐盟《電池法規》相當的、經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全認證制度。然而，進口商和分銷商的盡職調查——包括確保產品持有來自ILAC認可實驗室的可信IEC 62619和/或IEC 62133認證——是負責任的BESS黎巴嫩供應的主要實際門檻。IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是商業和工業應用鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準。IEC 62133（便攜式密封二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）適用於較小的住宅電池裝置。IEC 62933-5-2（電化學儲能系統安全要求）覆蓋系統級安全。鑑於黎巴嫩快速、往往非正式的電池部署背景，IEC安全認證的質量和真實性——特別是來自真正ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62619——是出口商和進口商的關鍵風險因素。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety; adopted by LIBNOR via IEC alignment)
IEC 62133 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Portable Applications (relevant for residential and small-commercial battery units)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety standard)
LIBNOR — Lebanese Standards Institution (national standards body; adopts IEC standards; libnor.gov.lb)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 or IEC 62133 in Lebanese project specifications or LIBNOR conformity assessments. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 (and where applicable IEC 62133) test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance. Given Lebanon's market context, the authenticity of the accreditation and the laboratory's independence should be verified — not all IEC test reports in circulation from low-cost sources carry genuine ILAC-accredited status.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准不被黎巴嫩项目规格或LIBNOR合格评定接受为IEC 62619或IEC 62133的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619（及适用时IEC 62133）测试证据。鉴于黎巴嫩市场背景，应核实认可资质的真实性和实验室的独立性——并非所有来自低成本来源的流通IEC测试报告均具备真正的ILAC认可状态。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準不被黎巴嫩項目規格或LIBNOR合格評定接受為IEC 62619或IEC 62133的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619（及適用時IEC 62133）測試證據。鑑於黎巴嫩市場背景，應核實認可資質的真實性和實驗室的獨立性——並非所有來自低成本來源的流通IEC測試報告均具備真正的ILAC認可狀態。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: LIBNOR adopts IEC standards and IEC 62619 / IEC 62133 are the internationally expected product safety evidence for BESS cells and modules supplied to Lebanon. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project specifications or LIBNOR conformity assessments. Exporters and importers should: (a) verify the current LIBNOR regulated-product list and conformity obligations for BESS imports directly with LIBNOR before shipment; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from a genuinely ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules — verify the accreditation status independently on the ILAC MLA signatory directory; (c) for residential and small-commercial battery units, obtain IEC 62133 certification in addition; (d) confirm the applicable IEC standard edition referenced in project specifications before committing to a test programme; (e) given Lebanon's rapidly-expanded, often informal market, verify that product certification documents are authentic and traceable — counterfeit or inflated certification is a documented risk in price-sensitive battery markets.
gap.zh: 关键差距：LIBNOR采纳IEC标准，IEC 62619/IEC 62133是供应至黎巴嫩的BESS电芯和模组的国际预期产品安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目规格或LIBNOR合格评定接受为替代依据。出口商和进口商应：（a）在出货前直接向LIBNOR核实现行LIBNOR受监管产品清单及BESS进口的合规义务；（b）从真正的ILAC认可实验室取得电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书——通过ILAC MLA签署方目录独立核实认可状态；（c）对于住宅和小型商业电池装置，同时取得IEC 62133认证；（d）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格中引用的IEC标准版本；（e）鉴于黎巴嫩快速扩张、往往非正式的市场，核实产品认证文件的真实性和可追溯性——在价格敏感的电池市场，虚假或夸大认证是有据可查的风险。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：LIBNOR採納IEC標準，IEC 62619/IEC 62133是供應至黎巴嫩的BESS電芯和模組的國際預期產品安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目規格或LIBNOR合格評定接受為替代依據。出口商和進口商應：（a）在出貨前直接向LIBNOR核實現行LIBNOR受監管產品清單及BESS進口的合規義務；（b）從真正的ILAC認可實驗室取得電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書——通過ILAC MLA簽署方目錄獨立核實認可狀態；（c）對於住宅和小型商業電池裝置，同時取得IEC 62133認證；（d）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格中引用的IEC標準版本；（e）鑑於黎巴嫩快速擴張、往往非正式的市場，核實產品認證文件的真實性和可追溯性——在價格敏感的電池市場，虛假或誇大認證是有據可查的風險。

mandatory_status.target: LIBNOR conformity is the practical product safety gate for regulated imports to Lebanon; a confirmed standalone mandatory pre-shipment BESS CoC regime has not been identified — verify directly with LIBNOR. IEC 62619 / IEC 62133 compliance is the internationally expected minimum for responsible BESS supply into Lebanon's market.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

source.publisher: LIBNOR — Lebanese Standards Institution (المؤسسة اللبنانية للمواصفات والمقاييس)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety certification regime has been identified for Lebanon as of the dataset date; however, LIBNOR's adoption of IEC standards means IEC 62619 (and IEC 62133 for residential-scale units) are the internationally expected technical baseline. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Lebanon project acceptance or LIBNOR conformity. Verify LIBNOR current regulated-product scope and confirm IEC evidence requirements before shipment. Given Lebanon's rapid, informal battery installation environment, supply only products with genuine ILAC-accredited IEC certification and provide comprehensive Arabic/English installation guidance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，黎巴嫩尚未确认独立强制性BESS产品安全认证制度；然而，LIBNOR对IEC标准的采纳意味着IEC 62619（以及住宅规模装置的IEC 62133）是国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足黎巴嫩项目验收或LIBNOR合规要求。出货前核实LIBNOR现行受监管产品范围并确认IEC证据要求。鉴于黎巴嫩快速、非正式的电池安装环境，仅供应持有真正ILAC认可IEC认证的产品，并提供全面的阿拉伯语/英语安装指导。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，黎巴嫩尚未確認獨立強制性BESS產品安全認證制度；然而，LIBNOR對IEC標準的採納意味著IEC 62619（以及住宅規模裝置的IEC 62133）是國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足黎巴嫩項目驗收或LIBNOR合規要求。出貨前核實LIBNOR現行受監管產品範圍並確認IEC證據要求。鑑於黎巴嫩快速、非正式的電池安裝環境，僅供應持有真正ILAC認可IEC認證的產品，並提供全面的阿拉伯語/英語安裝指導。
